findings.title: Meta description length is in range
Multiple H1 headings
findings.recommendation: Use one H1; demote the rest to H2/H3.
findings.evidence: Wildly Comfortable. Super Natural. | Table of Contents

findings.title: Heading levels skip a level
findings.detail: An H1 is followed by an H3.
findings.recommendation: Keep heading nesting sequential (no H2→H4 jumps).

findings.title: Images missing alt text
findings.detail: 3 of 46 tags have no alt attribute.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text (empty alt="" only for decorative images).

findings.title: Links with no anchor text
findings.recommendation: Give links descriptive anchor text for users and crawlers.

findings.title: Content is fairly hard to read
findings.recommendation: Consider shorter sentences/simpler words unless the audience is specialist.

findings.title: Dominant topics detected
findings.detail: information (294), may (181), allbirds (168), personal (131), platform (100), services (96)  ·  phrases: personal information, third parties, privacy policy

findings.title: Some filler phrasing
findings.recommendation: Tighten wording; prefer specifics over padding.
findings.evidence: in order to; each and every

findings.title: Repetitive vocabulary
findings.recommendation: Vary wording and add substance; heavy repetition signals thin or spun content.

findings.title: No visible author/byline
findings.detail: No author meta tag or byline detected near the top.
findings.recommendation: Add a named author with credentials — a core E-E-A-T (experience/expertise) signal.

findings.title: No structured data (JSON-LD)
findings.detail: The page has no application/ld+json markup.
findings.recommendation: Add JSON-LD for the page's entity (Article, Product, Organization…) to unlock rich results and clarify meaning for AI search.

findings.title: Few question-based headings
findings.detail: 1 of 36 subheadings are phrased as questions.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite key H2/H3s as the questions users actually ask — AI engines match answers to question-shaped headings.

findings.title: No direct answer up top
findings.detail: The opening doesn't state a concise answer/definition.
findings.recommendation: Lead with a 1–2 sentence direct answer before the details; AI overviews lift the top summary.
